name: chewtle
flavor_texts: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.
It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.
text: Chewtle is the Snapping Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: strong-jaw, shell-armor, swift-swim (hidden). Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 64, Defense: 50, Sp. Atk: 38, Sp. Def: 38, Speed: 44. Evolution line: chewtle → drednaw. Lore: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it. It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.
